context: Push public repo with Magic MCP key: how to handle secret
rationale: picked recommended; security-conscious about public exposure

context: What to vendor for cross-machine portability
Personas: keep as prompts or convert to real subagents
Add a decision agent that learns user patterns
Use graphify globally across all workspaces?
rationale: installer writes invasive PreToolUse hooks+CLAUDE.md per project; staleness; small repos dont need it; keyless code graph is 90% of value; keep CLI binary global only

options: install non-team + cherry-pick, keep CSO as brain
chosen: install non-team + cherry-pick, keep CSO as brain
rationale: gstack fills CSO execution gaps (browser QA, security audit, canary/freeze, design, release); CSO keeps state/daemon/decision-maker; non-team avoids supply-chain auto-update risk

context: Integrate superpowers + claude-mem with CSO/gstack overlap
rationale: user goal=self-sufficient CSO; resolved overlap via one-owner-per-layer: CSO brain, superpowers methodology, gstack tools, graphify recon, claude-mem episodic memory, cso-learn curated

context: Cross-session context loss (state files persist but not conversation)
rationale: user flagged as breaker; built 3-layer continuity (auto+rich checkpoint+startup recap) deterministic, not dependent on claude-mem API

context: Tool choice to extract real prompts from motionsites.ai after WebFetch failed on JS-rendered SPA
options: ask user to paste prompts manually
rationale: User explicitly picked browse over manual paste when asked via AskUserQuestion

context: Scraping motionsites.ai 3D prompts via clipboard-intercept hack hit inconsistent results (some cards returned stale/null text) after 1 confirmed full prompt extracted
options: keep debugging click/timing race in headless clipboard capture
stop, report partial success, let user manually copy remaining prompts
rationale: Diminishing returns - one full real prompt already proves the mechanism works; further headless clipboard-timing fights cost more than manual copy-paste by user. Matches existing memory: time-box optional polish, ship core value first.

context: Audit found 5/7 agents and ~14 routing-table skills had zero invocations ever despite mandatory routing rules
options: add hard enforcement gate to CLAUDE.md requiring decisions.jsonl proof of invocation
chosen: add hard enforcement gate to CLAUDE.md requiring decisions.jsonl proof of invocation
rationale: user flagged unused agents/skills as resource waste and false confidence; gate forces find-skills on unmapped tasks and proof-of-call for cso-learn before Complete

context: User audit request: CSO not invoked on some new sessions, recorded feedback not followed (e.g. todays earlier routing-table fix changed nothing)
chosen: Built real Stop hook on-stop-gate.js that returns {decision:block} to hard-block turn end when corrections exist but no learn-pass evidence, instead of another prose CLAUDE.md rule
rationale: Same-day re-audit proved the earlier prose-only HARD GATE section in CLAUDE.md (added hours earlier in this same project) had zero effect - agents/skills still at 0 invocations. User confirmed hard-hook-gate as the fix direction over AskUserQuestion.
